name: Hungarian Baked Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 small head green cabbage (about 1/2 lb.), cored and cut into 1/2 inch-thick slices
Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
2 red cooking apples, cored and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet with a cover, melt butter over medium heat.
2. Dust chicken lightly with paprika.
3. Brown chicken on both sides in melted butter. Cover; reduce heat.
4. Cook chicken for 30 minutes.
5. Place cabbage slices on the bottom of a buttered 13-by-9-inch baking dish.
6. Sprinkle cabbage with salt and pepper. Cover dish with aluminum foil.
7. Bake in a preheated 375-degree oven for 20 minutes, or until cabbage is almost tender.
8. Remove cabbage from oven; uncover.
9. Arrange apple and onion over cabbage. Sprinkle with sugar.
10. Place chicken pieces over top. Cover with foil.
11. Bake an additional 25-30 minutes, or until cabbage and chicken are tender.
12. Remove from oven; uncover.
13. Sprinkle with cheese. Return to oven just until cheese melts, about 5 minutes.
Yield: 6 servings, about 360 calories each.
